prompt: Static wide shot of a dry grass field at golden hour. The camera remains completely still for the entire video. During the first half of the video, absolutely no fire is visible anywhere. The field stands calm and untouched under a hazy sky, with gently swaying dry grass. No smoke, no sparks, no flames, no glowing embers. Exactly halfway through the video, a sudden ignition occurs across the field. During the second half of the video, a spreading line of low orange flames races across the grass with gray smoke rising, growing larger and more intense. Cinematic realism, physically realistic fire behavior, highly detailed flames, realistic smoke simulation, dramatic contrast between the first half and second half.
